svg.title: TravelMemory MERN stack deployment architecture — draxil.site on AWS ap-south-1
svg.desc: User browser sends HTTPS requests to Cloudflare which manages draxil.site DNS. Cloudflare routes frontend traffic via A record and CNAME www to the TM-Frontend-ALB, and API traffic via CNAME api to the TM-Backend-ALB. Each ALB distributes to two EC2 instances inside AWS ap-south-1. Frontend instances run React and Nginx. Backend instances run Node.js, Nginx, and PM2. Both backend instances connect to MongoDB Atlas via Mongoose.
